info.title: Consent & Preferences - Cookie Consent
info.description: The Cookie Consent APIs are used to integrate external systems and streamline the flow of data with Cookie Consent in the OneTrust Platform.

hostname.description: The OneTrust hostname such as app.onetrust.com, app-eu.onetrust.com, app-de.onetrust.com, app-uk.onetrust.com, app-apac.onetrust.com, trial.onetrust.com, or uat.onetrust.com.

tags.name: Applications
tags.description: The Applications APIs are used to manage application configurations and their associated consent experiences.

tags.name: Cookies
tags.description: The Cookies APIs are used to manage cookie definitions, categories, and their properties.

tags.name: Domains
tags.description: The Domains APIs are used to manage domain configurations and cookie scanning settings.

tags.name: Geolocation Rules
tags.description: The Geolocation Rules APIs are used to manage geographic rules that determine how consent experiences are applied based on user location.

tags.name: Scans
tags.description: The Scans APIs are used to manage website cookie scanning operations and results.

tags.name: Scripts
tags.description: The Scripts APIs are used to manage publishing of scripts to websites.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: The Templates APIs are used to manage reusable consent templates that define the structure and behavior of consent experiences.

post.description: Use this API to create a new application for scan and SDK publishing.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

put.description: Use this API to initiate an application scan with a file upload.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the application to create the scan for

file.description: File to upload as part of the scan request. Maximum size: 500 MB.

get.description:
Use this API to download the script files for the specified domain. The files will be downloaded within a folder in blob format.

> 🗒 Things to Know
> 
> - The domain must be in **Published** status.

> 👍 
> 
> For more information, see [Downloading and Deploying Scripts from Local Hosting](https://my.onetrust.com/s/article/UUID-3e2923d6-8364-c2fa-0625-7897395f4cd2).

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the domain.

get.summary: Get List of Geolocation Rule Groups
get.description: Use this API to retrieve a paginated list of geolocation rule groups. The `search` parameter can be used to optionally filter results by name.

parameters.name: searchStr
parameters.description: Search string to filter geo rule groups by name

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Field to sort by.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Sort direction.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number for pagination results, starting from 0.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of items to return per page.

domainId.description: The unique identifier of the domain.

domainCookieSourceRequestDtoList.description: The list of cookie source configuration requests for the domain.

cookieId.description: The unique identifier of the cookie.

lifespan.description: The duration for which the cookie remains active before expiring.

host.description: The domain or website that created the cookie.

description.description: The description of the cookie and its intended purpose.
description.example: this cookies is used for functional purposes only

thirdPartyDescription.description: The description of third-party cookies and their usage.
thirdPartyDescription.example: this cookies is used for targeting purposes only

length.description: Length of the Cookie lifespan, enter a number greater than 0 if this is a Persistent cookie, otherwise leave as 0

durationType.description: The type of duration indicating whether the cookie is session-based or persistent.

customCategoryName.description: The custom name assigned to the cookie category.

domainToDeleteIds.description: The list of domain identifiers to be removed from the system.

domainCookieCategoryList.description: The list of categories assigned to cookies for the specific domain.

domainCookieSource.description: The source from which domain cookies originate.

domainCookieSourceToDelete.description: The cookie sources that are marked for deletion.

descriptionTranslations.description: The translations of descriptions provided in different languages.

example.description: Ce cookie est utilisé à des fins fonctionnelles uniquement

langCode.description: The language code used for localization purposes.

defaultDescription.description: The standard description that is used when no translation is provided for a specific language.

thirdPartyDescription.description: The description of third-party cookies and their usage.

domainId.description: The unique identifier of the domain.

customCategoryName.description: The custom name assigned to the cookie category.

thirdParty.description: This flag indicates whether the cookie originates from a third-party source.

description.description: The description of the cookie and its intended purpose.
description.example: this cookies is used for targeting purposes only

resourceType.description: The type of web resource such as script, image, or stylesheet.

trackerType.description: The category of tracking technology being used.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item.

ResourceUrl.description: The web address where the resource is located.

entityId.description: The unique identifier of the entity.

entityType.description: The type of entity such as cookie, tag, page, form, service, or storage.

action.description: The action that was performed or is to be performed.

content.description: The main content or data payload of the response.

success.description: This flag indicates whether the operation completed successfully.

domainIds.description: List of domain IDs to assign to the geo rule group.

applicationIds.description: List of application IDs to assign to the geo rule group.

attributes.description: List of branding attributes. Allowed attributes (key: description)

name.description: Domain branding attribute name. Allowed attributes (key: description)
